texto: To look after my body, to pay it respect. To question my mind, which doesn't understand half as much as it thinks it does. To understand that the time spent in the gap between the endless stories we tell ourselves is the present.These days, I care more about being peaceful and happy than about being in love. I'm not sure love is love if it consumes you, if it dominates your thoughts.
explicacao: Citação de Olivia Gagan sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “To look after my body, to pay it respect. To question my mind, which doesn't understand half as m…” articula reflexao, intuition, love em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e love.
